item.title: It’s time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
kinda cool
gonna smoke that
that's pretty metal
that's a lot of movies
the early ones of course
I just use a fan
(it was me)
legend
every time
what is this, a McDonald’s for bees?
Arnie lookin kinda rough
no thanks
i don't know what Lidl is but i want that
i can think of like infinity that don't, but somehow still kinda true
you could mess with him with just a simple comma - "penis, man"
i won't lie, i've watched that show myself a time or 2
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Not even once
item.description:
This is a perfect slap in the face.
You know who else is known for keeping morbid trophies and making art with human remains? Serial killers. that's who.

item.title: the harpy's meme dump: volume 41
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. Today is a difficult day for me. I briefly whined about it, then remembered that the internet doesn't care about my problems, so I deleted it and have brought you funny content instead. However, if you are a person like me who has a dad who sucks, and today is not a great day... my advice to you is to fight him while you still have the chance to. Or at least yell at him for being terrible. ...Anyway, onwards!
Definitely not, there's so many wonderful ladies who are considerably funnier than I. We should all start a coven or something though, that would be rad
why do they respawn so quickly? dishes OP, nerf them
ah, yes...how perfect. ...for "gaming", of course.
o r b
a valid question
yaaaay birds!
dinner? movie? no thanks, let's go look at DINOSAURS
you deserve it, friend
with enthusiastic gratitude!
and then there I'll be, on the final boss fight, with 1000 healing potions, and I still won't use them. You know. JUST IN CASE.
as always, fuck JK Rowling
aaaand that's all for this meme dump, my imgur friends. Until next time, stay awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: The RV Flip research vessel is unique in the world, capable of switching from horizontal to vertical position in the open ocean
item.description: The RV Flip research vessel is unique in the world, capable of switching from horizontal to vertical position in the open ocean. Measuring around 108 meters long and weighing 700 tonnes, Flip is not a small ship. Engineers designed it so that it could tilt 90 degrees, placing the front of the ship 17 meters above the water (the height of a five-story building), while the stern dives up to 91 meters deep. This deep immersion of most of the ship improves its stability and resistance to waves. The transformation takes about 30 minutes, during which seawater is pumped into huge tanks at the stern, allowing the ship to right itself. This ship is considered one of the most important for scientific research in the marine environment. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/RP_FLIP
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.description: The test will have 100 problems, but I will only grade three random problems and base your entire grade on that.

Also, click on the comment bubble to comment on it, with the link already made for you! If you knew this already, awesome! If not, well now you know!  <3 (This doesn't work on the old site layout. Sorry) And now for the memes.

item.title: I am her hooman
item.description: This one, out of the 3, climbs up my leg or cries until I pick her up and then falls right to sleep - which makes it difficult to game. She is probably going to be called Dora the Ah Dora ble.
item.dc:creator: BrandonMoon

item.title: Cel Shading misconception
item.description:
New trophy available, I wanted to participate while sharing something related to my field as a game artist. I thought "hey why not cel shading/borderlands" The common misconception is that Borderlands games are Cel Shading because of their outline aesthetics but this is not what it is.
Cell shading is basically just the shadows being clamped to different values in rendering. The balls above are showing a simple example (Picture taken from google search)
This screenshot is from Unreal Marketplace (taken from google search)
Zelda games are very often using cel shading. It's a rendering style that is more often used alongside very minimal textures. It works well with solid colors as it creates a sort of a comic book coloring style.
Windwaker is also Cel Shading.
Jet Set Radio Future (2002, classic Xbox) was also using Cel shading and they mixed it with the infamous black outlines as they often work very well together, enhancing the comic book style effect. The occasional rendering mix of black outlines with cel shading are what, in my opinion, created the misconception that outlines = cel shading.
Dragonball games are also very big on pairing Cel Shading with geo/textures outlines.
My research on Borderlands games art development is not extensive but in my opinion, its simply models outlines rendered paired with actual lines drawn on the texture files. The shading itself has no Cel Shading style clamping. It doesn't take away anything from the Borderlands games aesthetic and style. It's great visuals, just not what its commonly called
Thank you for coming to my ted talk
item.dc:creator: ostranaut

item.title: My YouTube Silver Play Button Award
item.description: Here is me holding my YouTube silver play button award for me reaching 100,000 subscribers
item.dc:creator: frankiemacdonald
